metadata.name: SANDRA Desired State Use Case V1

rules: Desired State represents approved intent independently from observed state
every declaration requires an approval reference
every subject has a monotonic Desired State generation
generation zero represents absence of an existing Desired State record
new declarations use optimistic generation checks
Desired State configuration and limits are deeply immutable
Desired State does not contain live telemetry
Desired State does not issue imperative commands
Desired State does not contain adapter configuration
Desired State declaration does not evaluate policy
Desired State declaration does not create execution plans
Desired State declaration does not execute actions
